case_title: MARIO A BENFIELD VS. DIANA SALMON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY BENFIELD, MARIO A AS TO DEFENDANT SALMON, DIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED JAN-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SALMON, DIANA
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINITFF. PLAINTIFF MARIO A. BENFIELD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIANA SALMON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REPORTS TO THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS PAID THE FULL AMOUNT DUE $5,019.97 BY CHECK WHICH CLEARED FEB-07-17. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
